title: Clotted Cream Khanom
description: A quick and easy Thai dessert featuring clotted cream that is both sweet and crumbly without using any sugar.
instructions: Spoon the clotted cream into a heatproof bowl.
Gently warm the bowl on low heat, stirring occasionally until the clotted cream softens slightly and takes on a thick consistency.
If using, mix in powdered sugar to taste. Adjust amount based on desired sweetness.
Let cool before serving as it will continue to thicken more while chilling.
